title: Senior Performance Marketing Specialist
required_skills: Paid search / PPC hands-on experience (Google Ads, Microsoft Advertising, Amazon Ads)
Excel or Tableau / Power BI / Google Data Studio
bonus_skills: Ability to write technical requirements for analysts to automate reports
missing_skills: Hands-on PPC campaign execution (Google Ads, Amazon Ads, Microsoft Advertising)
Campaign scaling mechanics on paid search platforms
core_responsibilities: Own and manage paid search campaigns end-to-end across Amazon Ads and Google Ads
Optimize campaign performance and identify growth opportunities; report results daily, weekly, and monthly
Collaborate cross-functionally with operations, analytics, and creative teams to optimize landing pages and conversion rates
Establish KPI alignment across teams with emphasis on Margin, TACOS, and Sales metrics
Propose and test innovative ideas to drive measurable performance improvements
recommended_emphasis: Highlight Power BI (PL-300) and Looker Studio as direct matches for the required BI/data tooling
Frame campaign ROI analytics and KPI reporting experience to demonstrate measurable performance tracking
Emphasise A/B testing and experiment design skill
Acknowledge Google Ads / PPC learning curve proactively in cover letter
Lead with e-commerce funnel analytics (Moli Media, ECE Group) to signal domain relevance
